Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The WindowInfoWin32 constructor creates a platform binding structure and initializes the inherited structureSizeInBytes and type discriminator fields.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: WindowInfoWin32(HWND windowHandle, const V2UInt32& windowSizeInPixels); WindowInfoWin32(HWND windowHandle, HINSTANCE instanceHandle, const V2UInt32& windowSizeInPixels);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The Win32 window handle to bind.
The optional Win32 application instance handle.
The current drawable window size in pixels.
